description_long: This is a thick, old-looking book with a dark brown, worn leather cover secured by two broad leather straps running vertically across its front. The book's pages are stained and appear to be splattered with blood, with red drips running down the edges, giving it a sinister and macabre appearance. A severed, bloodied human finger protrudes from between the pages, acting as a gruesome bookmark. The book's corners are reinforced with metallic, gold-toned brackets, adding to its antique and mysterious look. The surface of the cover is marred by a bloody handprint, further emphasizing its eerie and unsettling nature. The overall design suggests this book is an object of horror or dark magic, likely intended as a prop or thematic element in a haunted or supernatural urban setting.
description: A thick, antique leather-bound book with blood stains, a severed finger bookmark, and gold corner brackets, exuding a dark and sinister aura.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing two leather straps, a bloody handprint, and a severed finger protruding from the right side.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the side, highlighting the blood-stained page edges and the absence of the finger on this side.
description_view_2: The back cover and gold corner brackets are visible, with the leather texture and straps clearly shown.
description_view_3: The opposite side view reveals the severed finger in more detail, with blood stains dripping from the pages.
attribute_cover_illustration: No illustration visible. The cover is plain brown leather with a bloody handprint as the only prominent visual element.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is brown leather with two gold-toned metal brackets at the ends and subtle embossed patterns, but no visible text or decorative elements.
